item.title: What Even Was Pretty Little Liars?
item.description: A playful look back at Pretty Little Liars and the question that still lingers: what even was it?

media:content.media:title: What Even Was Pretty Little Liars?
media:content.media:description: A playful look back at Pretty Little Liars and the question that still lingers: what even was it?

item.title: JoJo Siwa Gives Me Secondhand Embarrassment
item.description: A playful take on a cringe-worthy moment, with plenty of side-eye and secondhand embarrassment.

media:content.media:title: JoJo Siwa Gives Me Secondhand Embarrassment
media:content.media:description: A playful take on a cringe-worthy moment, with plenty of side-eye and secondhand embarrassment.
